parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const query = (item.customer_query || '').toLowerCase();

const knowledgeBase = [
  { id: 'FAQ-001', category: 'account', title: 'How do I reset my password', content: 'Question: How do I reset my password? Answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and follow the instructions sent to your email.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-002', category: 'account', title: 'I forgot my password. What should I do', content: 'Question: I forgot my password. What should I do? Answer: Use the Forgot Password option to reset your password by email.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-003', category: 'account', title: 'How can I change my email address', content: 'Question: How can I change my email address? Answer: Go to account settings and update your email in the profile section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-004', category: 'account', title: 'How do I delete my account', content: 'Question: How do I delete my account? Answer: Open settings and choose Delete Account or contact support for help.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-005', category: 'account', title: 'How can I update my profile information', content: 'Question: How can I update my profile information? Answer: Go to account settings and edit your profile details.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-006', category: 'account', title: 'Can I have multiple accounts', content: 'Question: Can I have multiple accounts? Answer: Only one account per user is allowed unless your plan explicitly supports multi-user access.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-007', category: 'account', title: 'How do I enable two-factor authentication', content: 'Question: How do I enable two-factor authentication? Answer: Open security settings and enable two-factor authentication for extra protection.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-008', category: 'account', title: 'Why am I unable to log in', content: 'Question: Why am I unable to log in? Answer: Check your credentials and make sure your account is active. Reset your password if needed.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-009', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I update my billing information', content: 'Question: How do I update my billing information? Answer: Open account settings and go to Billing to update your payment method.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-010', category: 'billing', title: 'I was charged twice. What should I do', content: 'Question: I was charged twice. What should I do? Answer: Please contact support with your transaction details so we can investigate the duplicate charge.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-011', category: 'billing', title: 'How can I cancel my subscription', content: 'Question: How can I cancel my subscription? Answer: Open subscription settings and click Cancel Subscription.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-012', category: 'billing', title: 'Will I get a refund after cancellation', content: 'Question: Will I get a refund after cancellation? Answer: Refunds depend on our refund policy and billing terms.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-013', category: 'billing', title: 'Why did my payment fail', content: 'Question: Why did my payment fail? Answer: Check that your payment details are correct and that your card or balance is valid.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-014', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I change my subscription plan', content: 'Question: Can I change my subscription plan? Answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan from the billing section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-015', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer student discounts', content: 'Question: Do you offer student discounts? Answer: Yes. Student discounts are available after successful verification.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-016', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I view my invoices', content: 'Question: How do I view my invoices? Answer: Go to the billing section in your account to download your invoices.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-017', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is the app not loading', content: 'Question: Why is the app not loading? Answer: Try refreshing the page clearing cache or checking your internet connection.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-018', category: 'technical', title: 'The app is crashing. How do I fix it', content: 'Question: The app is crashing. How do I fix it? Answer: Restart the app and make sure you are using the latest version.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-019', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I seeing an error message', content: 'Question: Why am I seeing an error message? Answer: Note the error message and try again. Contact support if it continues.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-020', category: 'technical', title: 'The website is slow. What can I do', content: 'Question: The website is slow. What can I do? Answer: Check your internet connection and try again during non-peak hours.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-021', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I update the app', content: 'Question: How do I update the app? Answer: Visit the app store or website and install the latest version.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-022', category: 'technical', title: 'Features are not working properly. What should I do', content: 'Question: Features are not working properly. What should I do? Answer: Try restarting the app or clearing cache. Contact support if the issue continues.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-023', category: 'technical', title: 'Why can\'t I upload files', content: 'Question: Why can\'t I upload files? Answer: Check file size limits and supported formats before uploading.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-024', category: 'technical', title: 'Is the service down', content: 'Question: Is the service down? Answer: Check our status page or try again after a few minutes.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-025', category: 'general', title: 'What services do you offer', content: 'Question: What services do you offer? Answer: We provide digital services including account management support tools and workflow automation features.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-026', category: 'general', title: 'How can I contact support', content: 'Question: How can I contact support? Answer: You can contact support through email chat or the help center.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-027', category: 'general', title: 'What are your working hours', content: 'Question: What are your working hours? Answer: Our support team is available 24 hours a day and 7 days a week.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-028', category: 'general', title: 'Where can I find help documentation', content: 'Question: Where can I find help documentation? Answer: Visit our help center for step-by-step guides and documentation.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-029', category: 'general', title: 'Do you have a mobile app', content: 'Question: Do you have a mobile app? Answer: Yes. Our mobile app is available on Android and iOS.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-030', category: 'general', title: 'How do I give feedback', content: 'Question: How do I give feedback? Answer: You can submit feedback through the app or by contacting support.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-031', category: 'general', title: 'Is my data secure', content: 'Question: Is my data secure? Answer: Yes. We use security controls to protect customer data.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-032', category: 'general', title: 'Can I use your service internationally', content: 'Question: Can I use your service internationally? Answer: Yes. Our services are available globally unless local regulations restrict access.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-033', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my username', content: 'Question: How do I change my username? Answer: Go to profile settings and update your display name if your plan allows it.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-034', category: 'account', title: 'Can I change my account ID', content: 'Question: Can I change my account ID? Answer: Account IDs are fixed for security and audit reasons and usually cannot be changed.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-035', category: 'account', title: 'How do I verify my email address', content: 'Question: How do I verify my email address? Answer: Open the verification email we sent and click the confirmation link.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-036', category: 'account', title: 'I did not receive the verification email. What should I do', content: 'Question: I did not receive the verification email. What should I do? Answer: Check spam or promotions folders and request a new verification email from account settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-037', category: 'account', title: 'How do I resend the verification email', content: 'Question: How do I resend the verification email? Answer: Use the resend verification option in account settings or on the login screen.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-038', category: 'account', title: 'Can I sign in with Google', content: 'Question: Can I sign in with Google? Answer: If social login is enabled on your workspace you can sign in with Google from the login page.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-039', category: 'account', title: 'Can I sign in with Apple', content: 'Question: Can I sign in with Apple? Answer: If Apple sign-in is enabled you can use it from the login page.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-040', category: 'account', title: 'Can I sign in with Microsoft', content: 'Question: Can I sign in with Microsoft? Answer: If Microsoft sign-in is enabled you can use it from the login page.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-041', category: 'account', title: 'How do I log out from all devices', content: 'Question: How do I log out from all devices? Answer: Open security settings and choose the option to sign out from all sessions.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-042', category: 'account', title: 'How do I see active sessions', content: 'Question: How do I see active sessions? Answer: Go to security settings to review your active sessions and connected devices.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-043', category: 'account', title: 'How do I remove a device from my account', content: 'Question: How do I remove a device from my account? Answer: Open active sessions in security settings and revoke the device you no longer trust.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-044', category: 'account', title: 'My account is locked. How do I unlock it', content: 'Question: My account is locked. How do I unlock it? Answer: Wait for the lockout period to end or contact support if you need manual review.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-045', category: 'account', title: 'Why was my account suspended', content: 'Question: Why was my account suspended? Answer: Accounts may be suspended for policy or security reasons. Contact support for review details.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-046', category: 'account', title: 'How do I reactivate my account', content: 'Question: How do I reactivate my account? Answer: Sign in and follow the reactivation steps or contact support if reactivation is unavailable.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-047', category: 'account', title: 'How do I update my phone number', content: 'Question: How do I update my phone number? Answer: Open account settings and update your phone number in the profile or security section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-048', category: 'account', title: 'How do I add a recovery email', content: 'Question: How do I add a recovery email? Answer: Go to account security settings and add a backup recovery email.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-049', category: 'account', title: 'How do I add a backup phone number', content: 'Question: How do I add a backup phone number? Answer: Open security settings and add a recovery phone number if the feature is enabled.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-050', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my password after signing in', content: 'Question: How do I change my password after signing in? Answer: Open security settings and choose Change Password.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-051', category: 'account', title: 'How often should I change my password', content: 'Question: How often should I change my password? Answer: Use a strong unique password and update it anytime you suspect your account may be at risk.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-052', category: 'account', title: 'Can I merge two accounts', content: 'Question: Can I merge two accounts? Answer: Account merging is not supported unless approved by support for special cases.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-053', category: 'account', title: 'Can I transfer my account to another email', content: 'Question: Can I transfer my account to another email? Answer: You can usually update the account email from settings but ownership review may be required.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-054', category: 'account', title: 'How do I download my account data', content: 'Question: How do I download my account data? Answer: Go to privacy or account settings and request a data export if available.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-055', category: 'account', title: 'How do I delete my profile picture', content: 'Question: How do I delete my profile picture? Answer: Open your profile settings and remove or replace the current photo.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-056', category: 'account', title: 'Why did I get a login alert email', content: 'Question: Why did I get a login alert email? Answer: We send login alerts when a new device or unusual sign-in is detected.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-057', category: 'account', title: 'How do I turn off login alerts', content: 'Question: How do I turn off login alerts? Answer: Some security alerts are mandatory and cannot be disabled. Optional alerts can be managed in notifications.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-058', category: 'account', title: 'How do I update notification preferences', content: 'Question: How do I update notification preferences? Answer: Go to notification settings and select which alerts or updates you want to receive.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-059', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my timezone', content: 'Question: How do I change my timezone? Answer: Update your timezone in profile or workspace settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-060', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my language', content: 'Question: How do I change my language? Answer: Go to settings and choose your preferred language from the language menu.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-061', category: 'account', title: 'Can I share my account with a teammate', content: 'Question: Can I share my account with a teammate? Answer: Personal accounts should not be shared. Use team seats or workspace invites instead.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-062', category: 'account', title: 'How do I invite a teammate', content: 'Question: How do I invite a teammate? Answer: Go to team or workspace settings and send an invite to your teammate\'s email.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-063', category: 'account', title: 'How do I remove a teammate', content: 'Question: How do I remove a teammate? Answer: Open team settings and remove the member from your workspace.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-064', category: 'account', title: 'Can I change user roles', content: 'Question: Can I change user roles? Answer: Yes. Workspace admins can change member roles from team settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-065', category: 'account', title: 'How do I become an admin', content: 'Question: How do I become an admin? Answer: Only an existing admin or owner can grant admin access.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-066', category: 'account', title: 'What is the difference between owner and admin', content: 'Question: What is the difference between owner and admin? Answer: Owners have full billing and workspace control while admins manage users and settings based on policy.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-067', category: 'account', title: 'How do I leave a workspace', content: 'Question: How do I leave a workspace? Answer: Open workspace settings and choose Leave Workspace if your role allows it.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-068', category: 'account', title: 'Can I use one email for multiple workspaces', content: 'Question: Can I use one email for multiple workspaces? Answer: Yes. The same email can usually join multiple workspaces if invited.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-069', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my profile photo', content: 'Question: How do I change my profile photo? Answer: Go to profile settings and upload a new image.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-070', category: 'account', title: 'How do I set a display name', content: 'Question: How do I set a display name? Answer: Open profile settings and update your display name.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-071', category: 'account', title: 'How do I close my workspace', content: 'Question: How do I close my workspace? Answer: Workspace closure usually requires owner action or support review.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-072', category: 'account', title: 'How do I recover my account if I lost access to my email', content: 'Question: How do I recover my account if I lost access to my email? Answer: Contact support to begin an ownership verification process.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-073', category: 'account', title: 'Can I disable two-factor authentication', content: 'Question: Can I disable two-factor authentication? Answer: If policy allows it you can disable two-factor authentication from security settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-074', category: 'account', title: 'My two-factor code is not working. What should I do', content: 'Question: My two-factor code is not working. What should I do? Answer: Check your device time sync and use a backup code if available.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-075', category: 'account', title: 'How do I get backup codes', content: 'Question: How do I get backup codes? Answer: Open two-factor authentication settings and generate recovery codes.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-076', category: 'account', title: 'How do I change my authenticator app', content: 'Question: How do I change my authenticator app? Answer: Disable and re-enable two-factor authentication to pair a new authenticator app.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-077', category: 'account', title: 'Why do I keep getting signed out', content: 'Question: Why do I keep getting signed out? Answer: Frequent sign-outs may happen due to browser settings inactivity timeouts or security policy.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-078', category: 'account', title: 'How do I set up single sign-on', content: 'Question: How do I set up single sign-on? Answer: Single sign-on setup is available on supported plans through admin authentication settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-079', category: 'account', title: 'Can I use a custom domain for login', content: 'Question: Can I use a custom domain for login? Answer: Custom domain support depends on your plan and admin settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-080', category: 'account', title: 'How do I contact security support', content: 'Question: How do I contact security support? Answer: Use the help center or support channel and mark the issue as a security concern.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-081', category: 'billing', title: 'When will I be charged for my subscription', content: 'Question: When will I be charged for my subscription? Answer: Charges are processed on your renewal date based on your billing cycle.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-082', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you bill monthly or yearly', content: 'Question: Do you bill monthly or yearly? Answer: We offer monthly and yearly billing on supported plans.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-083', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I switch from monthly to yearly billing', content: 'Question: How do I switch from monthly to yearly billing? Answer: Go to billing settings and choose the annual plan if available.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-084', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I switch from yearly to monthly billing', content: 'Question: How do I switch from yearly to monthly billing? Answer: You can change your billing cycle from billing settings subject to plan rules.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-085', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer prorated upgrades', content: 'Question: Do you offer prorated upgrades? Answer: Many upgrades are prorated based on remaining time in the billing cycle.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-086', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer prorated downgrades', content: 'Question: Do you offer prorated downgrades? Answer: Downgrade handling depends on your plan and billing policy.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-087', category: 'billing', title: 'Why was my card charged after cancellation', content: 'Question: Why was my card charged after cancellation? Answer: A charge may still appear if cancellation happened after the renewal cutoff or while a pending renewal was processing.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-088', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I add a payment method', content: 'Question: How do I add a payment method? Answer: Open billing settings and add a new payment method.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-089', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I remove a payment method', content: 'Question: How do I remove a payment method? Answer: Open billing settings and remove the saved payment method if another valid method exists.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-090', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I use PayPal', content: 'Question: Can I use PayPal? Answer: Available payment methods depend on your region and current billing options.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-091', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I pay by bank transfer', content: 'Question: Can I pay by bank transfer? Answer: Bank transfer is available only on selected plans or enterprise contracts.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-092', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I pay by invoice', content: 'Question: Can I pay by invoice? Answer: Invoice billing is generally available for larger business plans.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-093', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I update the card holder name', content: 'Question: Can I update the card holder name? Answer: Yes. Update your payment method details in the billing section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-094', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I change my billing address', content: 'Question: Can I change my billing address? Answer: Yes. Edit your billing address in billing settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-095', category: 'billing', title: 'Why was tax added to my invoice', content: 'Question: Why was tax added to my invoice? Answer: Applicable taxes depend on your billing location and tax rules.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-096', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I add my tax ID', content: 'Question: How do I add my tax ID? Answer: Go to billing settings and add your tax information if supported.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-097', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I get a VAT invoice', content: 'Question: Can I get a VAT invoice? Answer: If tax invoices are supported in your region they will appear in the billing section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-098', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I download a receipt', content: 'Question: How do I download a receipt? Answer: Receipts and invoices can be downloaded from billing history.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-099', category: 'billing', title: 'Where can I see billing history', content: 'Question: Where can I see billing history? Answer: Open billing settings and review the billing history or invoices section.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-100', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I get a copy of an old invoice', content: 'Question: Can I get a copy of an old invoice? Answer: Yes. Old invoices are usually available in billing history.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-101', category: 'billing', title: 'Why was my trial converted to a paid plan', content: 'Question: Why was my trial converted to a paid plan? Answer: Trials convert automatically if they are not canceled before the end date.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-102', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I cancel before trial ends', content: 'Question: How do I cancel before trial ends? Answer: Go to billing settings and cancel your plan before the trial expiration date.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-103', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer a free plan', content: 'Question: Do you offer a free plan? Answer: Free plan availability depends on the product and current pricing model.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-104', category: 'billing', title: 'How many seats are included in my plan', content: 'Question: How many seats are included in my plan? Answer: Included seats depend on your plan tier. Check the billing page for plan limits.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-105', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I add more seats', content: 'Question: How do I add more seats? Answer: Open billing or team settings and increase the number of seats.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-106', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I remove seats', content: 'Question: How do I remove seats? Answer: Reduce seats from billing or team settings subject to plan limits.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-107', category: 'billing', title: 'Why did my invoice amount change', content: 'Question: Why did my invoice amount change? Answer: Invoice totals can change due to taxes seat changes prorations or plan updates.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-108', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I pause my subscription', content: 'Question: Can I pause my subscription? Answer: Pause availability depends on your plan and account status.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-109', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I restart my subscription after canceling', content: 'Question: Can I restart my subscription after canceling? Answer: Yes. In many cases you can restart from billing settings or by purchasing again.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-110', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer nonprofit discounts', content: 'Question: Do you offer nonprofit discounts? Answer: Discount availability depends on current pricing programs and verification requirements.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-111', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you offer startup discounts', content: 'Question: Do you offer startup discounts? Answer: Promotional or startup pricing may be available during specific programs.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-112', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I use a promo code', content: 'Question: Can I use a promo code? Answer: If promotions are active you can apply a code during checkout or billing update.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-113', category: 'billing', title: 'My promo code is not working. What should I do', content: 'Question: My promo code is not working. What should I do? Answer: Check the code expiration plan eligibility and spelling then try again.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-114', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I get a refund for accidental purchase', content: 'Question: Can I get a refund for accidental purchase? Answer: Refunds depend on policy and may require manual review by support.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-115', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I change the billing email', content: 'Question: Can I change the billing email? Answer: Yes. Update the billing contact email in billing settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-116', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I split payment across two cards', content: 'Question: Can I split payment across two cards? Answer: Split payments are generally not supported unless your contract says otherwise.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-117', category: 'billing', title: 'Why is my card being declined', content: 'Question: Why is my card being declined? Answer: Your bank may decline the payment due to limits risk checks or outdated card details.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-118', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I retry a failed payment', content: 'Question: Can I retry a failed payment? Answer: Yes. You can update your method and retry from the billing page.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-119', category: 'billing', title: 'What happens if I miss a payment', content: 'Question: What happens if I miss a payment? Answer: Service access may be limited after a failed payment until billing is resolved.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-120', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I contact billing support', content: 'Question: How do I contact billing support? Answer: Use the support channel and choose billing as the issue category.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-121', category: 'billing', title: 'What is your refund policy', content: 'Question: What is your refund policy? Answer: Refund eligibility depends on your plan purchase date and local policy requirements.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-122', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I pay in my local currency', content: 'Question: Can I pay in my local currency? Answer: Supported billing currencies depend on your region and account configuration.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-123', category: 'billing', title: 'Why was I billed in a different currency', content: 'Question: Why was I billed in a different currency? Answer: Charges may be processed in your account currency or payment provider currency settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-124', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I prepay for multiple months', content: 'Question: Can I prepay for multiple months? Answer: Prepayment options are generally available only on selected business plans.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-125', category: 'billing', title: 'How do I update purchase order information', content: 'Question: How do I update purchase order information? Answer: Purchase order handling depends on your billing arrangement and plan type.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-126', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I transfer my subscription to another account', content: 'Question: Can I transfer my subscription to another account? Answer: Subscription transfers usually require support review.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-127', category: 'billing', title: 'My invoice shows the wrong company name. How do I fix it', content: 'Question: My invoice shows the wrong company name. How do I fix it? Answer: Update your billing profile and request a corrected invoice if needed.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-128', category: 'billing', title: 'Do you charge setup fees', content: 'Question: Do you charge setup fees? Answer: Setup fees depend on plan type and onboarding services.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-129', category: 'billing', title: 'What happens to my data after cancellation', content: 'Question: What happens to my data after cancellation? Answer: Data retention after cancellation depends on plan policy and local rules.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-130', category: 'billing', title: 'Can I restore a canceled paid plan', content: 'Question: Can I restore a canceled paid plan? Answer: In many cases yes if the account and data are still within the retention window.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-131', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I clear cache', content: 'Question: How do I clear cache? Answer: Open your browser settings and clear cached files then reload the site.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-132', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I clear app data', content: 'Question: How do I clear app data? Answer: Use the app settings or device settings to clear cached app data if supported.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-133', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is the page blank after login', content: 'Question: Why is the page blank after login? Answer: A blank page may be caused by cached assets browser extensions or a temporary service issue.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-134', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is the app stuck on loading', content: 'Question: Why is the app stuck on loading? Answer: Try refreshing signing out and back in or checking service status.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-135', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I report a bug', content: 'Question: How do I report a bug? Answer: Use the support channel and include steps to reproduce the bug.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-136', category: 'technical', title: 'What browser versions do you support', content: 'Question: What browser versions do you support? Answer: We support current major versions of modern browsers.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-137', category: 'technical', title: 'Does the app work on Safari', content: 'Question: Does the app work on Safari? Answer: Yes. Safari is supported on recent versions unless a feature says otherwise.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-138', category: 'technical', title: 'Does the app work on Firefox', content: 'Question: Does the app work on Firefox? Answer: Yes. Firefox is supported on recent versions.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-139', category: 'technical', title: 'Does the app work on Edge', content: 'Question: Does the app work on Edge? Answer: Yes. Edge is supported on recent versions.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-140', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I getting a 403 error', content: 'Question: Why am I getting a 403 error? Answer: A 403 error may indicate permission or security restrictions on the resource.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-141', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I getting a 404 error', content: 'Question: Why am I getting a 404 error? Answer: The requested page or resource may no longer exist or the URL may be incorrect.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-142', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I getting a 500 error', content: 'Question: Why am I getting a 500 error? Answer: A 500 error usually indicates a temporary server issue. Please retry shortly.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-143', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my dashboard empty', content: 'Question: Why is my dashboard empty? Answer: Check filters date range permissions and whether data exists for that workspace.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-144', category: 'technical', title: 'Why are my changes not saving', content: 'Question: Why are my changes not saving? Answer: Check your internet connection session status and whether the page has validation errors.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-145', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I restore unsaved changes', content: 'Question: How do I restore unsaved changes? Answer: Recovery depends on the feature. Some pages auto-save drafts while others require manual re-entry.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-146', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is a button disabled', content: 'Question: Why is a button disabled? Answer: A disabled action may require a certain role completed fields or a valid account state.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-147', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I missing a feature', content: 'Question: Why am I missing a feature? Answer: The feature may depend on plan level permissions region or phased rollout.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-148', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I enable dark mode', content: 'Question: How do I enable dark mode? Answer: Go to appearance settings if dark mode is supported on your account.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-149', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I switch themes', content: 'Question: How do I switch themes? Answer: Open appearance settings and choose your preferred theme.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-150', category: 'technical', title: 'Why are my notifications delayed', content: 'Question: Why are my notifications delayed? Answer: Notification delays can happen due to device settings email provider delays or queue timing.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-151', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I not receiving push notifications', content: 'Question: Why am I not receiving push notifications? Answer: Check device notification permissions app settings and power-saving restrictions.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-152', category: 'technical', title: 'Why am I not receiving email notifications', content: 'Question: Why am I not receiving email notifications? Answer: Check spam folders notification settings and whether the email address is verified.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-153', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is file upload stuck', content: 'Question: Why is file upload stuck? Answer: Large files unsupported formats or unstable connections can interrupt uploads.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-154', category: 'technical', title: 'What file types are supported', content: 'Question: What file types are supported? Answer: Supported file formats depend on the upload feature and workspace settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-155', category: 'technical', title: 'What is the maximum upload size', content: 'Question: What is the maximum upload size? Answer: Maximum upload size depends on your plan and the feature you are using.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-156', category: 'technical', title: 'Why was my file rejected', content: 'Question: Why was my file rejected? Answer: Files may be rejected due to size type corruption or security scanning rules.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-157', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I export my data', content: 'Question: How do I export my data? Answer: Use the export option available in the relevant page or settings menu.' },

  { id: 'FAQ-159', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my import failing', content: 'Question: Why is my import failing? Answer: Imports may fail due to invalid format missing required columns or file size issues.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-160', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I fix a sync issue', content: 'Question: How do I fix a sync issue? Answer: Try reconnecting the integration and checking service status or permission settings.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-161', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my integration disconnected', content: 'Question: Why is my integration disconnected? Answer: Tokens may expire or permissions may be revoked which can disconnect an integration.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-162', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I reconnect an integration', content: 'Question: How do I reconnect an integration? Answer: Open integrations settings and reconnect the affected service.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-163', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I revoke integration access', content: 'Question: How do I revoke integration access? Answer: Use the integrations page to disconnect the service and revoke access.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-164', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is search not working', content: 'Question: Why is search not working? Answer: Search results may depend on indexing permissions or exact available data.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-165', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my report incomplete', content: 'Question: Why is my report incomplete? Answer: Reports may be filtered by date source permissions or processing status.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-166', category: 'technical', title: 'Why are charts not loading', content: 'Question: Why are charts not loading? Answer: Charts may fail due to browser caching blocked scripts or temporary backend issues.' },

  { id: 'FAQ-169', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I check the service status', content: 'Question: How do I check the service status? Answer: Visit the status page for current uptime incidents and maintenance notices.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-170', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my API token not working', content: 'Question: Why is my API token not working? Answer: Check token scope expiration and whether the endpoint or environment is correct.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-171', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I regenerate an API token', content: 'Question: How do I regenerate an API token? Answer: Go to developer or security settings and create a new token if your role allows it.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-172', category: 'technical', title: 'Why is my request rate-limited', content: 'Question: Why is my request rate-limited? Answer: Rate limits protect service stability. Retry later or review your plan limits.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-173', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I troubleshoot connection timeouts', content: 'Question: How do I troubleshoot connection timeouts? Answer: Check your network firewall proxy settings and retry after a short wait.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-174', category: 'technical', title: 'Why does the app log me out during inactivity', content: 'Question: Why does the app log me out during inactivity? Answer: Session timeout behavior may be required by security policy.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-175', category: 'technical', title: 'Why are images not loading', content: 'Question: Why are images not loading? Answer: Image loading issues may be caused by network restrictions caching or content blocking.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-176', category: 'technical', title: 'How do I contact technical support', content: 'Question: How do I contact technical support? Answer: Use the support form and choose technical issue as the category.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-177', category: 'general', title: 'What is this platform used for', content: 'Question: What is this platform used for? Answer: The platform helps users manage accounts workflows and support operations.' },

  { id: 'FAQ-180', category: 'general', title: 'Do you have a help center', content: 'Question: Do you have a help center? Answer: Yes. The help center contains setup guides troubleshooting steps and FAQs.' },

  { id: 'FAQ-186', category: 'general', title: 'How long does support take to reply', content: 'Question: How long does support take to reply? Answer: Response time depends on your plan issue severity and queue volume.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-187', category: 'general', title: 'Do you support enterprise customers', content: 'Question: Do you support enterprise customers? Answer: Yes. Enterprise support depends on commercial arrangements and plan availability.' },

  { id: 'FAQ-191', category: 'general', title: 'Can I request accessibility support', content: 'Question: Can I request accessibility support? Answer: Yes. Contact support if you need accessibility assistance or accommodations.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-192', category: 'general', title: 'Do you support screen readers', content: 'Question: Do you support screen readers? Answer: Accessibility support depends on feature area and current implementation status.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-193', category: 'general', title: 'Where can I read the privacy policy', content: 'Question: Where can I read the privacy policy? Answer: The privacy policy is available on the official website.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-194', category: 'general', title: 'Where can I read the terms of service', content: 'Question: Where can I read the terms of service? Answer: The terms of service are available on the official website.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-195', category: 'general', title: 'How do I report abuse', content: 'Question: How do I report abuse? Answer: Contact support and include relevant evidence so the abuse report can be reviewed.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-196', category: 'general', title: 'How do I report a security issue', content: 'Question: How do I report a security issue? Answer: Use the security contact path or support channel and mark the issue as security-related.' },
  { id: 'FAQ-197', category: 'general', title: 'Do you comply with data regulations', content: 'Question: Do you comply with data regulations? Answer: Compliance support depends on your plan region and legal requirements.' },

function tokenize(value) {
  return (value || '').toLowerCase().split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(Boolean);
}

const queryTokens = tokenize(query);
const scoredDocs = knowledgeBase
  .map((doc) => {
    const docTokens = tokenize(`${doc.title} ${doc.content} ${doc.category}`);
    const overlap = queryTokens.filter((token) => docTokens.includes(token)).length;
    const categoryBonus = item.category && item.category === doc.category ? 1.5 : 0;
    return {
      ...doc,
      score: overlap + categoryBonus
    };
  })
  .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
  .slice(0, 3);

const retrieval_context = scoredDocs
  .filter((doc) => doc.score > 0)
  .map((doc, index) => `Document ${index + 1}\nID: ${doc.id}\nCategory: ${doc.category}\nTitle: ${doc.title}\nContent: ${doc.content}`)
  .join('\n\n');

return [{
  json: {
    ...item,
    retrieved_documents: scoredDocs,
    retrieval_context,
    retrieval_top_score: scoredDocs[0]?.score || 0,
    retrieval_has_candidate: Boolean(scoredDocs[0] && scoredDocs[0].score > 0)
  }
}];

assignments.name: response_text
assignments.value: ={{$json.faq_answer || 'Thanks for reaching out. We found guidance in our support knowledge base for your request.'}}
